title: Israel's retired generals must break their silence on the Iran war | Opinion
content: Gift this article Share to Facebook Share to X Print article Article printing is available to subscribers only Print in a simple, ad-free format Subscribe Comments: Save Zen Reading Zen reading is available to subscribers only Ad-free and in a comfortable reading format Subscribe Retired commanders understand the campaign cannot topple the ayatollahs or deliver victory, yet their silence is helping sustain a war that serves as a survival tool for Netanyahu's rule Dmitry Shumsky Follow 12:47 AM • April 01 2026 IDT As the days and nights pass, it is becoming clearer and clearer that Israel is waging another pointless war whose only purpose is the legal and political survival of a prime minister facing a criminal trial.
